creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
the web site might have changed, but the place to download the tarballs is
still the same.  It is unreachable because the version you had is outdated,
bu thas been fixed with a pr that got committed this morning by will this
morning.

To: <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org>
